generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller interfaced with ROS2 nodes for real-time speed control of the ego vehicle via Wi-Fi-based communication"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Integrated directional control system in the lower-level chassis receiving commands from Digital Twin Entity via ROS2 nodes"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking capability executed through the motor actuation system under Digital Twin control with 100ms latency requirement"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environmental perception sensor generating raw point clouds for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera providing supplementary visual data collection for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Integrated chassis sensors providing real-time vehicle state data including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance HokuyoPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point clouds transmitted from Physical Twin Entity to Digital Twin Entity via ROS2 topics"
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
    base:desc "Depth camera data streams transmitted from Physical Twin Entity to Digital Twin Entity via ROS2"
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) transmitted from Physical Twin Entity to Digital Twin Entity via ROS2"
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModel
    base:desc "Processed object tracks generated by DBSCAN+Kalman filtering in Physical Twin Entity and forwarded to Digital Twin Entity"
]

instance UserCommandData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom UserEntity
    base:desc "User commands (ACC enable/disable, speed adjustments) transmitted from User Entity to Digital Twin Entity"
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm combined with Kalman filter for object detection and state estimation from LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinComputeEnabler
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC logic for lead vehicle detection and speed regulation executed in Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CloudEdgeComputeEnabler
]

instance RawSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudData, DepthCameraData, VehicleStateData
    base:desc "Unprocessed sensor data including LiDAR point clouds, camera depth maps, and vehicle state metrics"
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    base:desc "Time-series object tracks generated from processed LiDAR data using DBSCAN+Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    base:desc "Processed ego vehicle state including real-time speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesReports : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL-stored human-readable reports containing time-series data for object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatabaseStorageEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware enabling intra-vehicle data collection from sensors to Physical Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService
]

instance ROS2ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based computation offloading from Physical Twin Entity to Digital Twin Entity for ACC logic execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlService
]

instance JetsonOrinComputeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer hosting onboard compute for Physical Twin Entity with Jetpack 5.0 SDK"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingService
]

instance CloudEdgeComputeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge server hosting Digital Twin Entity compute resources for ACC logic and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DatabaseStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system storing processed time-series reports and vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization UI framework rendering object tracks and projected driving paths for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote control panel enabling ACC enable/disable and speed adjustment commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance WiFiCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi-based inter-vehicle communication protocol enabling real-time data transmission between Physical and Digital Twin Entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregation of raw sensor data (LiDAR, camera, vehicle state) from Physical Twin Entity via ROS2 topics"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackInsight, VehicleStateInsight
]

instance PointCloudProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering of LiDAR point clouds for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessedObjectTracksData
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC logic execution including lead vehicle detection and speed regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides TransparentADASInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Full ACC control including enable/disable, speed adjustment, and emergency braking via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteTroubleshootingAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated generation of human-readable time-series reports for object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission of vehicle state, object tracks, and user commands between Physical and Digital Twin Entities"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIntegrityAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time object tracks visualization enabling driver trust in ACC system decisions"
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of ego vehicle speed and steering angle for system performance assessment"
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Filtered and clustered object tracks data used for collision avoidance algorithms"
]

instance TransparentADASInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-machine interface transparency showing real-time object tracks and driving path projections"
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic speed adjustment based on lead vehicle detection and ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate emergency braking command execution when collision risk is detected"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteTroubleshootingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Developer access to real-time data monitoring and reporting for remote system diagnostics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series analytics enabling potential runtime optimizations for fuel economy and driving patterns"
]

instance DataIntegrityAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Ensurance of 100ms latency and ±100ms clock synchronization for real-time system operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Entities
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Onboard ROS2 package hosting Jetson Orin Nano, sensors, and actuators for physical vehicle control"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, VehicleStateSensor,
                  MotorActuationSystem, SteeringServoActuator, EmergencyBrakingSystem,
                  JetsonOrinComputeEnabler, ROS2DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge compute hosting ACC logic, data processing, and storage with ROS2-based inter-entity communication"
    base:contains CloudEdgeComputeEnabler, ROS2ComputationOffloadingEnabler,
                  AdaptiveCruiseControlModel, DatabaseStorageEnabler,
                  VisualizationEnabler, ControlEnabler, WiFiCommunicationEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Remote UI for monitoring and control of the autonomous vehicle system with one-to-many functional dependencies"
    base:contains UserCommandData
]

// C12: Functional Entities (ISO 23247)
instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "LiDAR data normalization and preprocessing module implemented as ROS2 package"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingService
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 topic aggregation module collecting raw sensor data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 to Wi-Fi serialization module enabling inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance ControllingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ACC logic execution module implementing ISO 15622 Performance Class I requirements"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlService
]

instance PresentationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization rendering module displaying object tracks and driving paths"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Time-series report generation module storing processed data in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor/steering command conversion module interfacing with physical actuation systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables EmergencyBrakingAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

// C19: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Operational environment for 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle including road conditions and surrounding objects"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, VehicleStateSensor,
                  MotorActuationSystem, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinSimulationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge simulation environment hosting Digital Twin Entity with standardized communication interfaces"
    base:contains CloudEdgeComputeEnabler, DatabaseStorageEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
  - **Computed desired speed** from the **ACC Controlling Functional Entity (FE)** in the **Digital Twin Entity**, transmitted to the PT via **Wi-Fi** and **ROS2**.
  - **Actuation commands** (e.g., motor voltage, steering adjustments) sent from the DT to the PT’s **Vedder Speed Controller** and **steering servo** for real-time control.
  - **Emergency braking commands** initiated remotely via the **User Entity** and executed by the PT’s actuation system.
  Latency is constrained to **≤100 ms** (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance) for real-time safety-critical operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is governed by **real-time synchronization and latency constraints**:
  - **Clock synchronization**: All components (PT, DT, User Entity) are synchronized to an **accuracy of ±100 ms** to ensure temporal coherence for distributed control.
  - **End-to-end latency**: Communication between PT and DT must adhere to a **≤100 ms latency** (as per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication).
  - **Data update rates**:
    - **Sensor data streams** (LiDAR, camera) are processed at **real-time frequencies** (exact Hz not specified but implied by 'streams updated every perception cycle').
    - **ACC control loop** operates at a rate sufficient for **performance class I ACC** (no explicit Hz mentioned but inferred to be **~10–30 Hz** for real-time control)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **three-tiered, entity-based architecture** aligned with ISO 23247, with modifications for automotive use:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering)**, and **pre-processing FEs** (DBSCAN, Kalman filter). Deployed on **Jetson Orin Nano**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Executes **ACC logic (Controlling FE)**, **data processing (Data Collecting FE)**, and **storage (SQL database)**. Deployed on **cloud/edge server**.
  - **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization UI** and **Control Panel UI** for remote monitoring/management. Deployed on **remote workstation**.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures seamless interoperability between ROS2 (intra-vehicle) and Wi-Fi (inter-vehicle) communication. The constellation adheres to **modularity principles** (loose coupling) and **real-time constraints** (≤100 ms latency)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **design, development, and operational phases** of the PT’s lifecycle:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for **cyber-physical experimentation** (e.g., ACC logic validation via simulation).
  - **Development Phase**: Enables **remote troubleshooting** and **data-driven debugging** via real-time monitoring.
  - **Operational Phase**: Supports **real-time ACC control**, **predictive maintenance**, and **remote management** of the PT.
  The DT represents the PT in its **as-operated state**, with **high-fidelity models** of the **ACC system** and **environmental interactions** (e.g., object tracking)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin achieves **high fidelity** through:
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: Clock accuracy of **±100 ms** ensures temporal alignment between PT and DT.
  - **Sensor Fusion**: Combines **LiDAR (Hokuyo UST-10LX)** and **depth camera (Intel D435i)** for robust object tracking via **DBSCAN + Kalman filtering**.
  - **ACC Compliance**: Adheres to **ISO 15622** for Performance Class I ACC, ensuring valid speed control logic.
  - **Latency Constraints**: **≤100 ms** end-to-end latency guarantees timely actuation responses.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**:
    - **Real-time monitoring** via UI for operator feedback.
    - **Emergency braking tests** to verify safety-critical responses.
  Uncertainty sources include **sensor noise** (mitigated by DBSCAN) and **network jitter** (constrained by Wi-Fi latency)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs the following technical connection details:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **Wi-Fi**: Used for **inter-entity communication** between PT and DT (no explicit topology mentioned; assumed to be a **point-to-point or star topology** based on typical automotive setups).
    - **ROS2**: Used for **intra-entity communication** within each entity (PT, DT, User).
  - **Data Translation**:
    - **Data Translation FE** handles serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment between entities.
    - Supports **custom communication layers** or **OPC UA (IEC 62541)** for standardized data exchange (as referenced in background).
  - **Security Assumptions**:
    - **No explicit mention of encryption** (Wi-Fi assumed to be unencrypted unless configured externally).
    - **No detailed security protocols** specified beyond the physical-to-virtual interaction."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard the 1/10-scale vehicle), running **ROS2** and **Jetpack 5.0**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on a **remote server/cloud/edge node** (unspecified hardware), capable of offloading compute-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC logic).
  - **User Entity**: Deployed on a **remote workstation**, providing the **3D Visualization UI** and **Control Panel**.
  - **Data Storage**: Hosted on the **Digital Twin Entity’s SQL database** (external to the PT)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports limited horizontal integration:
  - **ROS2 Integration**: Enables interoperability with **third-party automotive tools** (e.g., **Simulink**, **OPC UA** for future standardization).
  - **Data Exchange**: **SQL database** allows integration with **external analytics platforms** for post-hoc analysis.
  - **No Explicit Mention**: The document does not detail integration with **other DTs**, **enterprise systems**, or **cloud platforms** (e.g., AWS, Azure). Potential future work includes **OPC UA** for industrial interoperability."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system addresses data ownership and privacy as follows:
  - **Data Storage**:
    - Ego vehicle state data is stored on a **device external to the vehicle** (remote server/cloud).
    - No explicit mention of **data ownership** (PT owner vs. DT service provider) or **privacy policies** (e.g., GDPR compliance).
  - **Access Control**:
    - No details provided on **user authentication**, **role-based access**, or **data anonymization**.
  - **Geographic Privacy**:
    - No mention of **location-based privacy concerns** or **data encryption** for sensitive vehicle data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture framework for **entity-based DT design** (Observable Manufacturing Element → Digital Twin Entity → User Entity).
  - **ISO 15622**: **ACC system specification** (Performance Class I compliance for speed regulation).
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: **V2V communication latency requirements** (≤100 ms end-to-end).
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: **Potential future integration** for standardized data translation (not implemented in this case study).
  - **ROS2**: **Middleware standard** for automotive software development.
  The architecture deviates from ISO 23247 by introducing a **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard) to host **automotive-specific resources** (sensors, actuators)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system incorporates the following security and safety considerations:
  - **Safety**:
    - **Latency constraint**: ≤100 ms end-to-end delay to prevent control delays in critical scenarios.
    - **Clock synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy to ensure temporal coherence for distributed control.
    - **Emergency braking**: Remote command capability for critical stoppage.
    - **Human-in-the-Loop**: System classified as **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** (David & Bork taxonomy).
  - **Security**:
    - **No explicit security protocols** mentioned (e.g., Wi-Fi encryption, authentication).
    - **No mention of**:
      - Cybersecurity risks (e.g., man-in-the-middle attacks).
      - Unauthorized remote control vulnerabilities.
      - Data integrity mechanisms (e.g., checksums, digital signatures).
    - **Assumed security**: Reliance on **physical access control** (e.g., remote workstation access) and **Wi-Fi network security** (not detailed)."
]
